no_changes_rationale:
status: no_changes_needed
reason: The requested structured review-session prompt renderer, budget refusal, telemetry wiring, and named tests are already present in the current tree and the verification commands pass without any edits.
verification_command: cd cli && go test -run 'TestReviewSessionPromptAssemblyPinnedRolling|TestReviewSessionPromptAssemblyBudgetRefusal|TestReviewPromptTelemetryIncludesSectionBytes|TestReviewContextOverflow|TestReviewFailureNotCloseBead|TestEvidencePrimitiveUsage' ./internal/agent/... ./internal/server/...
evidence:
  - cli/internal/server/review_session_prompt.go:1-274 defines RenderReviewPrompt with pinned, rolling, and unresolved-findings sections plus PromptBudgetExceededError.
  - cli/internal/server/review_session_prompt_test.go:1-80 covers pinned/rolling order and budget refusal.
  - cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review.go:563-606 short-circuits with PROMPT_BUDGET_EXCEEDED/context_overflow before provider dispatch.
  - cli/internal/agent/evidence_telemetry.go:10-54 and cli/internal/agent/evidence_telemetry_test.go:211-311 cover section-byte telemetry in the artifact bundle.
  - cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_evidence_test.go:242-415 includes the named review overflow and AST/import regression checks.
